title: Two-Phase Commit (2PC) vs. 3PC
description: Evaluate the mechanisms and trade-offs of Two-Phase Commit (2PC) and Three-Phase Commit (3PC) protocols. Analyze the "blocking problem" inherent in atomic commitment protocols and explain why they are often avoided in high-scale distributed systems.
objectives: Evaluate the mechanisms and trade-offs of Two-Phase Commit (2PC) and Three-Phase Commit (3PC) protocols.
Analyze the "blocking problem" inherent in atomic commitment protocols and explain why they are often avoided in high-scale distributed systems.
